[
  {
    "testCaseId": "POS_001",
    "title": "Successful Attach Procedure with Valid Credentials",
    "description": "Verify that a UE (User Equipment) can successfully perform the attach procedure to the 5G network using valid credentials and parameters.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is powered on and within coverage of 5G cell",
      "Network is operational and accepting attach requests"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Access the 5G CLI interface using `SSH admin@<IP>` and authenticate with appropriate admin credentials.",
      "Trigger the attach procedure from the UE with valid authentication credentials and parameters.",
      "Monitor the attach request acceptance via CLI logs and status output.",
      "Verify that the network accepts the attach and assigns appropriate session parameters."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "Attach procedure completes successfully without errors.",
      "UE receives attach accept message with assigned network parameters.",
      "Network logs indicate successful attach event."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE is attached to the network and able to send/receive data."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "SSH admin@<IP>"
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "CLI log inspection",
      "Network status commands output",
      "UE attach accept confirmation"
    ],
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING"
  },
